creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Sat Jan 18 02:25:27 2014
New Revision: 340141
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/340141
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r340141/

Log:
  - Update from 2.0.1 to 2.2.2
  - Add stage support
  
  while here
  - Convert USE_GMAKE to USES
  - Remove the indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/185670
  Submitted by:	Martin Dieringer <martin.dieringer@gmx.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/print/rtf2latex2e/Makefile
  head/print/rtf2latex2e/distinfo
  head/print/rtf2latex2e/pkg-plist

Modified: head/print/rtf2latex2e/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/rtf2latex2e/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:07:54 2014	(r340140)
+++ head/print/rtf2latex2e/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:25:27 2014	(r340141)
@@ -2,18 +2,18 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rtf2latex2e
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	print
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-unix/2-0
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-unix/2-2
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:C|\.|-|g}
 
 MAINTAINER=	martin.dieringer@gmx.de
-COMMENT=	A newer filter that converts RTF (MS Rich Text Format) into LaTeX
+COMMENT=	Newer filter that converts RTF (MS Rich Text Format) into LaTeX
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-USE_ZIP=	yes
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USES=		gmake
+MAKE_ARGS=	CC=${CC} \
+		mandir=${MAN1PREFIX}/man/
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/print/rtf2latex2e/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/rtf2latex2e/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:07:54 2014	(r340140)
+++ head/print/rtf2latex2e/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:25:27 2014	(r340141)

+SHA256 (rtf2latex2e-2-2-2.tar.gz) = eb742af22f2ae43c40ea1abc5f50215e04779e51dc9d91cac9276b98f91bb1af
+SIZE (rtf2latex2e-2-2-2.tar.gz) = 1103749
